mnemonics.title: Bounded for Batch
mnemonics.content: Think of a BATCH of cookies. It's a finite, complete set that you bake all at once. Similarly, BATCH processing handles a BOUNDED, complete dataset.

mnemonics.title: Unbounded Stream
mnemonics.content: Think of a live STREAM of water. It's continuous and never-ending. STREAM processing handles an UNBOUNDED, continuous flow of data.

mnemonics.title: Lambda Layers
mnemonics.content: **B**atch Layer (Historical), **S**peed Layer (Real-Time), **S**erving Layer (Query). Remember the order: Data goes to Batch and Speed, results are Served.
